name: Our Golden Times
overview: During the bright days of summer, two people became close friends, but they also parted with a vague emotion. After several autumns and winters, both him and his life have changed drastically. They meet again by chance, and this time, "he" doesn't want to let go again.

trailers.title: 同人網劇 Trailer《如果我願意 Our Golden Times》預告 Trailer
